events.title: Mud Season is Real
events.thought: The GPS said the road was passable. The road had a different opinion. Waldo did not get stuck — but Waldo had a conversation with gravity that lasted 20 minutes and involved a hi-lift jack.
events.status: Road passable but deeply rutted. Aired down to 20psi. Recovered without assistance.

events.title: Fairbanks — First Resupply
events.thought: Civilization detected. Waldo is wary of parking lots but will tolerate them for propane, groceries, and a shower. The KO3s are already caked with the Nenana corridor. Good.
events.status: Fairbanks, AK. Resupply complete. Laundry: done. Morale: high.
